Jo bhi zulm aur bad-sulooki woh usse, uski family se, ya apni family se jhel rahi hai, usse chhutkara dilane ke liye, usay talaq de dein.
Usay mere liye behtar banayein aur mujhe uske liye behtar, aur humein jald se jald shaadi karwa dein, dono families ke masail ke saath Madina mein, iss saal bohot si barkat aur khair ke saath.
Yousuf (AS) ki khoobsurati, Dawood (AS) ki awaaz, aur Suleiman (AS) ka saltanat aur daulat, aur mujhe is duniya aur aakhirat mein kamyabi de dein.

Chahe jo bhi wajah ho ke woh wahan atki hui hai aur zulm aur bad-sulooki jhel rahi hai, mujhe nahi pata; Aapko zyada maloom hai. Usse un tamam cheezon se azaad kar dein taake woh unka muqabla kar sake. Usay taqat, quwat, sehat aur umeed de dein.
Uske dil mein Allah aur Uske Rasool ke baad meri liye bepanah aur la-muhaddad muhabbat daal dein.
Uski khwahish banayein ke woh mujhse shaadi kare aur is par kaam kare.
Usay sirf mujhse khenchne wala banayein aur sirf mujhse khenche.
Mujhe sirf uski taraf khenchne wala banayein.
Uska dil sirf mujhse aur mere paas sukoon paaye, aur sirf mere paas rahat paaye.
Mera dil sirf uske paas aur uske saath sukoon paaye, aur sirf uske paas rahat paaye.
Usay mujhse wafadari de, aur mujhe usse wafadari de.
Kisi aur ladke ya shauq ko uske paas aane na dein, aur usay har mard se meri siwa bachayein. Uske dil ko har mard se meri siwa bachayein.
Uska akhlaq Amma Khadija, Amma Aisha, aur Amma Fathima ki tarah banayein, aur mujhe is saal usse shaadi karwa dein.
Uska akhlaq Mufti Tariq Masood Shab aur Sajad Nauman Maulana jaisa banayein, jo apne ustaadon ki wives ke akhlaq ki tareef karte hain, aur mujhe is saal usse shaadi karwa dein.
Mere rizq aur rozi ko apni fazal se khol dein.
Sab ke dil ko meri taraf narm, meetha aur muhabbat bhara bana dein, jaise Aapne Fir'aun aur uske logon ke liye Musa (AS) ke liye kiya tha.
Mujhe duniya ka sab se ameer insan bana dein, aur meri daulat ko Qiyamah ke din tak kabhi bhi khatam na hone dein.
Mujhe Kingfisher Tower ka bungalow de dein.
Mujhe luxury car ki collection de dein.

Mujhe das free, stress-free, asaan aur pyar bhari jobs de dein jo Textron se behtar ho, permanent naukri ke tor par, jismein mujhe bohot saara free aur asaan waqt mile jismein main trading aur business jaise kaam kar sakoon.
Mujhe journal website jald se jald banane mein madad dein, behtareen features ke saath aur sab se kam kharch mein, aur meherban tareeqe se.
Hamare beech mein la-muhaddad sukoon aur muhabbat se barkat dein.
Koi bhi cheez usse mujhse nuqsan na pohonchne de, na hi usay mujhse kisi tareeqe se nuqsan pohonchne dein, chahe wo zehni, jazbaati, ya jismani ho.
Humein ek doosre ki aankhon ka thanda bana dein.
Mere walidain ko lambi aur achi sehat de dein, jismein wo meri kamyabi dekh saken, zinda rah saken aur uska lutf utha saken.
Mujhe Madina ki shehri aur rehaish de dein.
Mujhe kabhi bhi akela ya bina khwahish ke na chhod dein; hamesha meri hifazat karein.
Make every single one regret for treating me bad, left, insulted or thought I'm or I was weak.
Help Firoz ma'am and everyone as such.
Never let anyone or anything hurt or insult me.
Give me very strong and attractive personality and character.
Give me immense confidence and guts don't let anything or anyone fear me apart from you oh Allah.
Make me the smartest of the humankind.
Please give me a luxury jet and helicopter collection.
Please give me the world's best luxurious palaces collection.
Please give me Saudi citizenship.
The world's most successful and dominating business group like BlackRock.
